confusion_points.description: The event cards at the bottom of the screen were cut off - I could only see the top portion (date and category labels) but not the event names or descriptions. It was unclear if I needed to scroll to see them or if clicking was possible.

Small circular icons with letters (like 'T' for The Visionairs, 'P' for ProbOrg) appeared next to the 'by [organizer]' text. I was not sure what these icon circles meant - they had no text label explaining them.

The first click on the event card (on the image area) did not navigate to the details page - it just scrolled back to the top of the listing page. There was no visible 'View Details' button or link. I had to figure out that clicking the event title text itself was the way to open the details page.

On the event details page, the 'ORGANIZED BY' section shows a circular icon with just the letter 'T' next to 'The Visionairs'. This icon-only circle has no label explaining what it represents, though I eventually guessed it was an initial/avatar.

suggestions: Add a clearly labeled 'View Details' or 'Learn More' button on each event card so users know how to open the details page without guessing.
Make sure event cards are fully visible without requiring scrolling, or clearly show that there is more content below (e.g., a visible scroll indicator or arrow).
Replace or supplement circular letter-icons next to organizer names with the full organization name only, or add a tooltip/label explaining that the circle is the organization's logo/initial.
Avoid cutting off event cards at the bottom of the screen on initial page load - consider showing complete cards so users can read the full information without needing to scroll.
reasoning:
Wonderful! The page has loaded and I can now see the full details for the event "Let's talk About our visions." Let me read everything on this page carefully:

- At the top, it shows a navigation path: **Events / The Visionaires / Let's talk About our visions** - that helps me know where I am.
- The event type labels show: **WORKSHOP** and **HYBRID**
- The event title is: **"Let's talk About our visions"**
- Organized by: **The Visionaires**

**DATE & TIME section:**
- Friday, March 20, 2026
- 4:35 PM – 4:36 PM
- America/Los_Angeles (that's the time zone, I think)

**ABOUT THIS EVENT section:**
- "This is a gathering for people who want to take their career to another level" - That sounds very interesting!

**ORGANIZED BY section:**
- Shows a circular "T" icon and "The Visionairs" - I notice the "T" in the circle is a logo or initial for the organization. I understand now that it's just the first letter of their name.

**Tickets section:**
- "No tickets available at this time." - So unfortunately I can't register right now.

I have successfully found and viewed the details page for an event! The event "Let's talk About our visions" is a Workshop on Friday, March 20, 2026, organized by The Visionaires. I was confused a couple of times by the small circular icons (like the "T" and "P" icons) next to organizer names, as I wasn't sure what they meant at first. Eventually I understood they were just the first letter of the organization's name.
